channel.title: Acm on Validated Patterns
channel.description: Recent content in Acm on Validated Patterns

item.title: New option to use a single ArgoCD instance
item.description: The Validated Patterns framework now supports a global.singleArgoCD flag that consolidates all group applications into a single ArgoCD instance

item.title: Multi-cluster GitOps with Provisioning
item.description: With validated patterns, you can easily create and configure complex cluster topologies

item.title: To musthave or to mustonlyhave
item.description: ACM has multiple enforcement strategies, be careful which one you use
